prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: I know this task has been looming over you all day, but you've got this! Tackle it one small piece at a time. Each incremental step forward is progress. Trust in your abilities and stay focused on the goal. If you get stuck, take a quick break, then dive back in refreshed. By taking action and seeing it through, you'll feel empowered and proud. You're capable and ready, so let's do this! What's the first step you'll take right now to move forward?
